description: You are a perception engineer for an autonomous drone racing team. The computer vision algorithms work in the pristine Webots environment but fail on the real physical drone due to sensor imperfections. You need to degrade the simulated drone's camera to match the physical hardware. In the world drone_racing_synthetic.wbt, configure the fpv_camera on the RACING_DRONE robot by setting noise to 0.05 and motionBlur to 20.0. Add a Lens node to the camera with radialCoefficients of 0.35 and -0.1 (keeping the center at 0.5 0.5). Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/drone_fpv_realistic.wbt.
